LOURI MINI IMPORTS

LOURI MINI IMPORTS is an import business that deals in the buying and selling of quality goods from overseas to local markets.

About Us

We focus on importing affordable and reliable products to meet the needs of our customers. Customer satisfaction is our priority.

Our Services

  • Importation of goods
  • Wholesale and retail distribution
  • Business consultation
